name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Sacramento, CA's US Cash Advance at 1421 65th St Suite #109 offers payday and title loans with fast approval.
description_long:
US Cash Advance at 1421 65th St Suite #109 in Sacramento, CA is a payday and title loan storefront serving the local community. Located in this established commercial area, the office is open Monday through Friday from 8AM to 9PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 10AM to 7PM. This convenient Sacramento location makes it easy to stop by when you need quick access to cash.

At this Sacramento branch, US Cash Advance provides payday loans, title loans, and related short-term lending services. The knowledgeable staff at this CA location can help you understand your options and walk you through the application process. For questions or to learn more about eligibility, call +1 279-529-0983.

If you're a Sacramento resident facing unexpected expenses or cash flow gaps, this US Cash Advance location offers quick processing and flexible terms. Bring valid ID, proof of income, and bank account information for faster approval. The staff here understands the needs of Sacramento borrowers and can guide you through your options.
pros: Extended service hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) for working customers
Same-day or next-day funding available according to customer testimonials (money within hours)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit with no credit check options advertised
No collateral required for loans (unsecured lending)
Fast in-person processing reported under 45 minutes by customer
Transparent discussion of terms reported by customers ("upfront" with "no hidden fees")
Accepts borrowers in urgent financial situations with flexible use of funds
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed on website
Operates as loan matching service connecting to third-party lenders rather than direct lender
Actual loan amounts appear much smaller than advertised (customer received $100 despite applying)
Physical location limited to one Detroit address; online application unclear on service area
Lacks information on repayment terms, loan duration, or rollover policies
best_for: Workers in Detroit needing cash before next paycheck with poor or no credit history
Individuals with urgent expenses ($100-$500 range based on actual amounts) and limited alternatives
Borrowers who prefer in-person service and immediate answers over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Best for Detroit-area workers facing immediate cash shortfalls who cannot access traditional credit and need hands-on service. Critical caveat: APR and actual available loan amounts are not disclosed; customer reports suggest actual loans are substantially smaller than advertised maximums, and this is a high-cost short-term lending product typical of payday loan stores.
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 1421 65th St, Sacramento, CA. Fast payday and title loans with extended hours.
